summary: Strengthened the handoff from chapter 11's overnight pursuit into the morning market opening and tightened the final approach to the tollhouse so chapter 13 picks up more cleanly without changing chapter beats.
edits: Added an opening sentence that links the morning market scene to the prior chapter's image of Paris continuing through crisis.
Adjusted the last line to place Elise and Lucien closer to the wall by the tollhouse, setting up chapter 13's opening position more directly.
Checked the style bible for calibration-only example lines and found none present verbatim in the chapter.
